articles.title_en: Russian lawmakers propose sending conscripts to serve in Emergency Situations Ministry fire units
articles.lead_en: A bill introduced in the State Duma would send conscripts to serve in military units of Russia’s Federal Fire Service, part of the Emergency Situations Ministry, the Russian business daily Vedomosti reported.
articles.title_raw: Russian lawmakers propose sending conscripts to serve in Emergency Situations Ministry fire units
articles.lead_raw: A bill introduced in the State Duma would send conscripts to serve in military units of Russia’s Federal Fire Service, part of the Emergency Situations Ministry, the Russian business daily Vedomosti reported.

articles.title_en: One killed in Crimea, two injured in Yaroslavl as Russian air defenses down 519 drones
articles.lead_en: A drone strike sparked a fire at an industrial facility in the Dzerzhinsky District of the Kaluga Region
